_comment: Coverage ratchet floors. The ratchet (cao_mcp_apps/scripts/coverage-ratchet.mjs) fails CI if measured line coverage drops below these floors. Phase 0 seeded null placeholders (record-only); Phase V task 12.5 raised the floors to the measured values to lock in the gains. Floors sit a small margin below the measured values (python 87.21%, frontend 90.92%) to absorb cross-Python-version jitter while still blocking real regressions.
